channel.title: Networking on linuxrepos
channel.description: Recent content in Networking on linuxrepos

item.title: How I Setup My Website
item.description: This shows you have I automate my workflows and setup my website for maximum productivity and search

item.title: Macos on Linux
item.description: This shows you all the steps to install a MacOS VM in Linux QEMU using Virtual Machine Manager or virt-manager.

item.title: Auto Mount with SystemD
item.description: This shows how to automount remote network drives using systemd and fstab

item.title: Robocopy - Copying files the right way in Windows
item.description: This guide shows how to copy files in windows when dealing with large volumes of files and very long file paths past 255 characters.
